Baby Cost Calculator

Estimate first-year baby costs. Select your choices for feeding, childcare, and gear to see a personalized cost breakdown.

FAQ

How much does a baby cost in the first year?

The average first-year cost is $12,000-$15,000 without childcare, or $25,000-$35,000 with full-time daycare.

What is the biggest baby expense?

Childcare is typically the largest expense ($800-$2,500/month). Without childcare, diapers and formula are the biggest recurring costs.

How can I reduce baby costs?

Breastfeed if possible, buy secondhand gear, use cloth diapers, accept hand-me-downs, and compare daycare options.
